item.title: Not only Google
item.description: Google is so powerful that it hides other search engines from us. We simply do not know about the existence of most of them. Meanwhile, there are still a large number of excellent search engines in the world that specialize in books, science, and other smart information. Keep a list of sites you've never heard of. www.refseek.com is a search engine for academic resources. More than a billion sources www.worldcat.org - search the content of 20,000 global libraries. https://link.springer.com - access to more than 10 million scientific documents: books, articles, www.bioline.org.br is a library of published bioscientific journals http://repec.org - Volunteers from 102 countries collected nearly 4 million publications www.science.gov is a U.S. government search engine for more than 2200 scientific sites. www.pdfdrive.com is the largest website for free download of PDF books. Claim more than 225 million titles. www.base-search.net is one of the most powerful search engines for academic research texts. More than 100 million scientific articles, 70% of which are free
item.dc:creator: Niceisinfrance

item.title: Busty Girl Dump
item.description: The artist is Rampaige, and here is her website: http://bustygirlcomics.com/ Also I never understood why there doesn't exist a brand that allows you ladies to get sized for each breast individually then sells you a cup in the pattern and size you want for each boob. Fasteners in front to Link the perfectly fit cups, stap in back for support . From what I understand alot of woman wind up with one boob being the stud and one being the dud . I dunno just seems like a common complaint among the women I've been with.
item.dc:creator: Beattywill80

item.title: 4 weeks weigh-in
item.description: As of Jan 3rd I have not touched sugar, flour, pasta, bread, and have made all meals from scratch. Carb reduced. No prefabricated foods. This is just from diet, and I have never been hungry. will start exercise too. My goal is 70 kg, posting to stay committed, stay tuned :)

item.title: Nazis in my hometown :-(
item.description: So, in case you can’t read that awful font, they’re from Longview, TX. If you happen to be from Longview and recognize any of these cunts, send this image to their workplace, etc. Call them out and take them down. There’s regular Trump caravans parading up and down the main commercial road in their jacked-up trucks fitted with multiple flags so it’s no surprise there would be some Nazis in the area.

item.title: Jewish, Romani, Polish, gay, etc...
item.description: My best friend has been having it rough since the last administration put kids in cages. Her depression has made life difficult at the best of times, but she feels isolated and scared with all of the Nazis coming forward. The "protests" a d gatherings in our city are deplorable. Often times she doesn't like to go out alone. Fear is strong. Love is stronger. Punching Nazis is the strongest. So to all of my Jewish, Romani, Polish, gay, or otherwise attacked-by-Nazi peoples - I'm sorry you have to endure this. Just know you are not alone. And thank you, imgur, for being a place where I can show her that people around the globe fucking hate nazis. It's made her laugh quite a bit. Most viral edit: holy shit you guys. I let her read the comments. This community is pretty awesome. Thank you
item.dc:creator: DeviKit

item.title: Dumperino 8 or something
item.description:
I apologize in advance for the level of humor in some of these
Exhibit A
It do be like that though
Gotta catch em all
What a lineup
Sorry
Get ready fellow allergy having ass weaklings
Every day
I sent this to my vegan friend. She hates me
Such a bop
Again, sorry
And this
Last sorry for now. Hope it's been good reading. Imgur has been a great companion for me while recovering from a face surgery. Better now luckily but still miles to go!
item.dc:creator: Grevling89

item.title: O'sha protect me, for I'm about to do some sketchy shit
item.description: Woohoo, most viral! Umm, send cat pics I guess? I'm working out of town and miss my furbabies
item.dc:creator: PeteyVonWho

item.title: Scientists don't owe non-scientists a debate
item.description: Demands for public debate are a standard trick used by anti-science activists to create a false semblance of parity between their views and the scientific consensus. They love to say 'If the science can't be debated, is it really science?' Don't let them get away with this. Call them out every time. Scientists don't owe non-scientists a debate, especially under conditions in which the scientific method is not respected. Science *can* be debated, but this is done by scientists, using science!
item.dc:creator: SankariSuomi

item.title: Ambush predator modus operandi.
item.description: Notice how the bobcat gave himself a little bit of runway to pick up speed before surmounting the crest of the trap. This way he has time to shake off a bit of the sand lag and close the gap before the birds know what's happening. If I had to guess, I'd say he's done this before.
item.dc:creator: 1Ofold
